amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.

items.full_description: The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass.

You may ONLY park in the Spaces that are marked with Blue Metropolis Signs. These spaces are located toward the back of the lot. Failure to park in these Marked spaces may result in a ticket, tow, or boot.
Gather your belongings and request your taxi/rideshare to the airport.

departure.text: Upon your arrival back to the airport, gather your belongings and reserve your taxi/ridshare back to the lot.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Airport Center LAS - Uncovered Self Park
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 5030 Paradise Rd. This is the entrance address for the 5030 Paradise Rd. - Airport Center Las Vegas Lot, operated by Metropolis. It is located on the East/Left-hand side of Paradise Rd. (a one-way street) between E Bell Dr. and Gus Giuffre Dr.
restrictions: There is currently no shuttle service to/from LAS airport. Customers must secure a taxi/rideshare for transportation.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
Entering/exiting the facility does not require touching shared surfaces.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.

items.full_description: The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
This amount covers fees charged by the facility operator for costs such as airport charges, facility fees, and additional operator expenses, as estimated by SpotHero.

arrival.text: Check in at the front desk and present your Parking Pass (either printed or on a mobile device). You will receive a daily parking permit that you must display on your vehicle.
You may park anywhere that doesn’t say “Reserved”.
There is no shuttle service to the airport. You may book a ride to the airport using Rideshare or Taxi!

departure.text: When you return to the airport, please arrange transportation back to the facility using Rideshare or a Taxi. There is no shuttle service from the airport.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: Residence Inn Las Vegas Hughes Center - Uncovered Self Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 370 Hughes Center Dr. This is the Residence Inn Las Vegas Hughes Center lot, operated by Ashford Inc. It is located on the north side of Hughes Center Dr. between Paradise Rd. and Center Cl. The entrance is marked by a red 'residence inn' sign with white lettering.
restrictions: Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.

amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.

arrival.text: Upon arrival, please check in with the front desk in order to register your vehicle and obtain parking lot access.
You may park anywhere as advised by the front desk.
There is no shuttle service to the airport. You may book a ride to the airport using Rideshare or Taxi!

departure.text: When you return to the airport, please arrange transportation back to the facility using Rideshare or a Taxi. There is no shuttle service from the airport.

common.title: Courtyard by Marriott Las Vegas Convention Center - Uncovered Self Park
common.operator_display_name: Courtyard by Marriott Las Vegas Convention Center Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3275 Paradise Rd. This is the Courtyard by Marriott Las Vegas Convention Center parking lot, operated by Courtyard by Marriott Las Vegas Convention Center. It is located on the West side of the Paradise Rd. between Convention Center Dr. and E Desert Inn Rd. You can only access this location by traveling South on Paradise Rd.

common.title: Residence Inn by Marriott LVCC - Uncovered Self Parking
common.operator_display_name: Residence Inn by Marriott LVCC Parking
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 3225 Paradise Rd. This is the Residence Inn by Marriott LVCC parking lot, operated by Residence Inn by Marriott LVCC. It is located on the West side of the Paradise Rd. between Convention Center Dr. and E Desert Inn Rd. You can only access this location by traveling South on Paradise Rd.
